title: The Scavenger's Bargain
trigger_condition: When exploring an abandoned market district with at least 50% hunger
description: You stumble upon a makeshift stall operated by a gaunt figure in patched clothing. Behind them, shelves hold an assortment of canned goods and clean water. The scavenger eyes you hungrily, then gestures to their wares. 'Trade? I don't take caps. Something... personal.'

choices.option: Offer a cherished memento from your past
choices.consequence: Lose 1 sentimental item, gain 3 canned food and 2 clean water. +15 morale penalty for 2 days.

choices.option: Share a dangerous secret about a nearby settlement
choices.consequence: Gain 5 canned food. Random settlement relationship decreases by 30. Unlocks 'Blackmail' event chain.

choices.option: Donate a significant amount of your blood
choices.consequence: Lose 40% current health, gain 2 medical kits and 4 clean water. Health regeneration reduced by 50% for 3 days.
No trade occurs. 25% chance scavenger becomes hostile.
